description: The Independent Cartel of Acapulco was a Mexican criminal gang based in Acapulco, Guerrero, formed in 2010 as a split from the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel after the death of Arturo Beltrán Leyva. It engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and murder, known for flaying victims' faces. The group was severely damaged by 2011 and faded from public view, with its territory taken over by rival La Barredora.
